reviews.author: tanveer khan
reviews.review_body: VIBGYOR High School has been a transformative experience for any child. The school's unique academic approach balances rigour with creativity, and their emphasis on sports is commendable, promoting growth without fostering unhealthy competition. I highly recommend VIBGYOR High School for its holistic education approach.

reviews.author: Mandeep Kaur
reviews.review_body: Vibgyor School is a platform where every child learns not only academics but also sports. I am happy that my child goes to this school. The principal and the staff of the school are also very supportive of my child's growth.

reviews.author: Jyoti Bajaj
reviews.review_body: An excellent institution, provides top-notch curriculum, highly qualified staff, student-student-oriented approach...offers an array of sports and performing arts...

reviews.author: Mridula Chawla
reviews.review_body: VIBGYOR , where learning is put to meaningful actions. Just like its name , It offers you vivid and beautiful areas to excel in. 🌈Vibgyor follows a unique curriculum that allows students to make their way to a better future. Its inclusive approach not only fosters a healthy and active lifestyle but also strengthens the sense of community , creating a win win scenario for everyone involved. Dedicated staff, vibrant atmosphere, and strong curriculum make it a perfect choice for students in Gurgaon.

reviews.author: Shaurya Madan
reviews.review_body: Awesome curriculum. Best school in Gurugram. Is highly recommended as it gives personal attention to each and every student.

reviews.author: Deepika A.S
reviews.review_body: Vibgyor Gurugram is truly exceptional in its approach to nurturing children's holistic development. From its outstanding facilities to its dedicated teachers, coaches, and innovative teaching methodologies, every aspect of the school is geared towards creating an enriching environment for students. It's evident that the children genuinely enjoy coming to school, and the positive impact on their development is unmistakable. Vibgyor Gurugram is undoubtedly a remarkable institution dedicated to fostering the growth and success of every child in its care.

reviews.author: Vipul Jain
reviews.review_body: Vibgyor High, Gurgaon provides a wonderful platform of learning and growth for both my kids (currently in grade 8 and 3). We moved from Vibgyor Bangalore in the middle of academic year and with integrated centralised curriculum, it was a smooth transition. The student teacher ratio is 9:1 which makes the learning process very effective and interactive. The school campus is well maintained and highly secured with child friendly infrastructure. The curriculum is very balanced and enhances higher order thinking skills across subjects, in a stress free manner. Loads of activities throughout the year in the form of subject specific activities, competitions and fun fridays. SPA and VIVA competitions give students a wonderful platform to hone their extra curricular skills. Most importantly, the academic team is very experienced, loving and accomodating.

reviews.author: Ankita Jain
reviews.review_body: Child friendly curriculum, focusing on the holistic development of the child. Good environment.

reviews.author: BM makkar
reviews.review_body:
Vibgyor High is one of the best schools in gurgaon. Good school with proper infrastructure and .Best thing about the school is each student gets an opportunity to represent talents.The institution works really hard in providing everything that is the best to its students.
Highly recommended.
